scenario.name: BYE
scenario.send: BYE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: alice <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: bob <sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=remote-tag Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
